targetTranslation: a book (subject of أُنزِلَ - was sent down)
ayahArabic: كِتٰبٌ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ فَلَا يَكُن فِى صَدْرِكَ حَرَجٌ مِّنْهُ لِتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ وَذِكْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: [This is] a Book revealed to you, [O Muḥammad] - so let there not be in your breast distress therefrom - that you may warn thereby and as a reminder to the believers.

ayahArabic: كِتٰبٌ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ فَلَا يَكُن فِى صَدْرِكَ حَرَجٌ مِّنْهُ لِتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ وَذِكْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: [This is] a Book revealed to you, [O Muḥammad] - so let there not be in your breast distress therefrom - that you may warn thereby and as a reminder to the believers.

ayahArabic: كِتٰبٌ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ فَلَا يَكُن فِى صَدْرِكَ حَرَجٌ مِّنْهُ لِتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ وَذِكْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: [This is] a Book revealed to you, [O Muḥammad] - so let there not be in your breast distress therefrom - that you may warn thereby and as a reminder to the believers.

targetTranslation: your chest (referring to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ)
ayahArabic: كِتٰبٌ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ فَلَا يَكُن فِى صَدْرِكَ حَرَجٌ مِّنْهُ لِتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ وَذِكْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: [This is] a Book revealed to you, [O Muḥammad] - so let there not be in your breast distress therefrom - that you may warn thereby and as a reminder to the believers.

ayahArabic: كِتٰبٌ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكَ فَلَا يَكُن فِى صَدْرِكَ حَرَجٌ مِّنْهُ لِتُنذِرَ بِهِۦ وَذِكْرَىٰ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: [This is] a Book revealed to you, [O Muḥammad] - so let there not be in your breast distress therefrom - that you may warn thereby and as a reminder to the believers.

targetTranslation: all of you follow closely! (plural command)
ayahArabic: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكُم مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Follow, [O mankind], what has been revealed to you from your Lord and do not follow other than Him any allies. Little do you remember.

ayahArabic: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكُم مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Follow, [O mankind], what has been revealed to you from your Lord and do not follow other than Him any allies. Little do you remember.

targetTranslation: was sent down (to إِلَيْكُم/to you all)
ayahArabic: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكُم مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Follow, [O mankind], what has been revealed to you from your Lord and do not follow other than Him any allies. Little do you remember.

targetTranslation: your Lord (referring to the Lord of all those being addressed)
ayahArabic: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكُم مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Follow, [O mankind], what has been revealed to you from your Lord and do not follow other than Him any allies. Little do you remember.

targetTranslation: you (all) follow closely/intensively (as a prohibition with لا)
ayahArabic: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكُم مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Follow, [O mankind], what has been revealed to you from your Lord and do not follow other than Him any allies. Little do you remember.

ayahArabic: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكُم مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Follow, [O mankind], what has been revealed to you from your Lord and do not follow other than Him any allies. Little do you remember.

targetTranslation: protectors/guardians (as object of لَا تَتَّبِعُوا - do not follow)
ayahArabic: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكُم مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Follow, [O mankind], what has been revealed to you from your Lord and do not follow other than Him any allies. Little do you remember.

targetTranslation: a little (describing how much remembering happens)
ayahArabic: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكُم مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Follow, [O mankind], what has been revealed to you from your Lord and do not follow other than Him any allies. Little do you remember.

ayahArabic: ٱتَّبِعُوا۟ مَآ أُنزِلَ إِلَيْكُم مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا۟ مِن دُونِهِۦٓ أَوْلِيَآءَ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Follow, [O mankind], what has been revealed to you from your Lord and do not follow other than Him any allies. Little do you remember.

ayahArabic: وَكَم مِّن قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنٰهَا فَجَآءَهَا بَأْسُنَا بَيٰتًا أَوْ هُمْ قَآئِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And how many cities have We destroyed, and Our punishment came to them at night or while they were sleeping at noon.

targetTranslation: we destroyed it (referring to قَرْيَةٍ - town)
ayahArabic: وَكَم مِّن قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنٰهَا فَجَآءَهَا بَأْسُنَا بَيٰتًا أَوْ هُمْ قَآئِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And how many cities have We destroyed, and Our punishment came to them at night or while they were sleeping at noon.

targetTranslation: our might (as the doer of جَآءَ)
ayahArabic: وَكَم مِّن قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنٰهَا فَجَآءَهَا بَأْسُنَا بَيٰتًا أَوْ هُمْ قَآئِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And how many cities have We destroyed, and Our punishment came to them at night or while they were sleeping at noon.

ayahArabic: وَكَم مِّن قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنٰهَا فَجَآءَهَا بَأْسُنَا بَيٰتًا أَوْ هُمْ قَآئِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And how many cities have We destroyed, and Our punishment came to them at night or while they were sleeping at noon.

targetTranslation: they (the people of the town being destroyed)
ayahArabic: وَكَم مِّن قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنٰهَا فَجَآءَهَا بَأْسُنَا بَيٰتًا أَوْ هُمْ قَآئِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And how many cities have We destroyed, and Our punishment came to them at night or while they were sleeping at noon.

ayahArabic: وَكَم مِّن قَرْيَةٍ أَهْلَكْنٰهَا فَجَآءَهَا بَأْسُنَا بَيٰتًا أَوْ هُمْ قَآئِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And how many cities have We destroyed, and Our punishment came to them at night or while they were sleeping at noon.

ayahArabic: فَمَا كَانَ دَعْوَىٰهُمْ إِذْ جَآءَهُم بَأْسُنَآ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And their declaration when Our punishment came to them was only that they said, "Indeed, we were wrongdoers!"

ayahArabic: فَمَا كَانَ دَعْوَىٰهُمْ إِذْ جَآءَهُم بَأْسُنَآ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And their declaration when Our punishment came to them was only that they said, "Indeed, we were wrongdoers!"

targetTranslation: when (connects to جَآءَهُم - came to them)
ayahArabic: فَمَا كَانَ دَعْوَىٰهُمْ إِذْ جَآءَهُم بَأْسُنَآ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And their declaration when Our punishment came to them was only that they said, "Indeed, we were wrongdoers!"

ayahArabic: فَمَا كَانَ دَعْوَىٰهُمْ إِذْ جَآءَهُم بَأْسُنَآ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And their declaration when Our punishment came to them was only that they said, "Indeed, we were wrongdoers!"

ayahArabic: فَمَا كَانَ دَعْوَىٰهُمْ إِذْ جَآءَهُم بَأْسُنَآ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And their declaration when Our punishment came to them was only that they said, "Indeed, we were wrongdoers!"

targetTranslation: they said (referring to the disbelievers in the ayah)
ayahArabic: فَمَا كَانَ دَعْوَىٰهُمْ إِذْ جَآءَهُم بَأْسُنَآ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And their declaration when Our punishment came to them was only that they said, "Indeed, we were wrongdoers!"

ayahArabic: فَمَا كَانَ دَعْوَىٰهُمْ إِذْ جَآءَهُم بَأْسُنَآ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And their declaration when Our punishment came to them was only that they said, "Indeed, we were wrongdoers!"

targetTranslation: unfair people (predicate of كُنَّا - we were)
ayahArabic: فَمَا كَانَ دَعْوَىٰهُمْ إِذْ جَآءَهُم بَأْسُنَآ إِلَّآ أَن قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظٰلِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And their declaration when Our punishment came to them was only that they said, "Indeed, we were wrongdoers!"

ayahArabic: فَلَنَسْـَٔلَنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أُرْسِلَ إِلَيْهِمْ وَلَنَسْـَٔلَنَّ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then We will surely question those to whom [a message] was sent, and We will surely question the messengers.

ayahArabic: فَلَنَسْـَٔلَنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ أُرْسِلَ إِلَيْهِمْ وَلَنَسْـَٔلَنَّ ٱلْمُرْسَلِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then We will surely question those to whom [a message] was sent, and We will surely question the messengers.

ayahArabic: فَلَنَقُصَّنَّ عَلَيْهِم بِعِلْمٍ وَمَا كُنَّا غَآئِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then We will surely relate [their deeds] to them with knowledge, and We were not [at all] absent.

ayahArabic: فَلَنَقُصَّنَّ عَلَيْهِم بِعِلْمٍ وَمَا كُنَّا غَآئِبِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then We will surely relate [their deeds] to them with knowledge, and We were not [at all] absent.

targetTranslation: on that day (when the weighing of deeds happens)
ayahArabic: وَٱلْوَزْنُ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْحَقُّ فَمَن ثَقُلَتْ مَوٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the weighing [of deeds] that Day will be the truth. So those whose scales are heavy - it is they who will be the successful.

targetTranslation: they became heavy (referring to مَوٰزِينُهُۥ - his scales)
ayahArabic: وَٱلْوَزْنُ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْحَقُّ فَمَن ثَقُلَتْ مَوٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the weighing [of deeds] that Day will be the truth. So those whose scales are heavy - it is they who will be the successful.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْوَزْنُ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْحَقُّ فَمَن ثَقُلَتْ مَوٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the weighing [of deeds] that Day will be the truth. So those whose scales are heavy - it is they who will be the successful.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْوَزْنُ يَوْمَئِذٍ ٱلْحَقُّ فَمَن ثَقُلَتْ مَوٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلْمُفْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the weighing [of deeds] that Day will be the truth. So those whose scales are heavy - it is they who will be the successful.

targetTranslation: they became very light (subject: مَوٰزِينُهُۥ - his scales)
ayahArabic: وَمَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those whose scales are light - they are the ones who will lose themselves for what injustice they were doing toward Our verses.

ayahArabic: وَمَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those whose scales are light - they are the ones who will lose themselves for what injustice they were doing toward Our verses.

ayahArabic: وَمَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those whose scales are light - they are the ones who will lose themselves for what injustice they were doing toward Our verses.

ayahArabic: وَمَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those whose scales are light - they are the ones who will lose themselves for what injustice they were doing toward Our verses.

ayahArabic: وَمَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those whose scales are light - they are the ones who will lose themselves for what injustice they were doing toward Our verses.

ayahArabic: وَمَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those whose scales are light - they are the ones who will lose themselves for what injustice they were doing toward Our verses.

targetTranslation: they wrong/treat unfairly (referring to those who lost themselves in this ayah)
ayahArabic: وَمَنْ خَفَّتْ مَوٰزِينُهُۥ فَأُو۟لٰٓئِكَ ٱلَّذِينَ خَسِرُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا يَظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And those whose scales are light - they are the ones who will lose themselves for what injustice they were doing toward Our verses.

targetTranslation: we established you firmly (in الْأَرْضِ - the earth)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ مَكَّنَّاكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَجَعَلْنَا لَكُمْ فِيهَا مَعٰيِشَ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly established you upon the earth and made for you therein ways of livelihood. Little are you grateful.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ مَكَّنَّاكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَجَعَلْنَا لَكُمْ فِيهَا مَعٰيِشَ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly established you upon the earth and made for you therein ways of livelihood. Little are you grateful.

targetTranslation: little (describing how much تَشْكُرُونَ you thank)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ مَكَّنَّاكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَجَعَلْنَا لَكُمْ فِيهَا مَعٰيِشَ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly established you upon the earth and made for you therein ways of livelihood. Little are you grateful.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ مَكَّنَّاكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ وَجَعَلْنَا لَكُمْ فِيهَا مَعٰيِشَ قَلِيلًا مَّا تَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly established you upon the earth and made for you therein ways of livelihood. Little are you grateful.

targetTranslation: we created you all (followed by ثُمَّ صَوَّرْنٰكُمْ - then we formed you)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنٰكُمْ ثُمَّ صَوَّرْنٰكُمْ ثُمَّ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ لَمْ يَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّاجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly created you, [O mankind], and given you [human] form. Then We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam"; so they prostrated, except for Iblees. He was not of those who prostrated.

targetTranslation: we shaped you all (with extra effort/care)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنٰكُمْ ثُمَّ صَوَّرْنٰكُمْ ثُمَّ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ لَمْ يَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّاجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly created you, [O mankind], and given you [human] form. Then We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam"; so they prostrated, except for Iblees. He was not of those who prostrated.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنٰكُمْ ثُمَّ صَوَّرْنٰكُمْ ثُمَّ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ لَمْ يَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّاجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly created you, [O mankind], and given you [human] form. Then We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam"; so they prostrated, except for Iblees. He was not of those who prostrated.

ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنٰكُمْ ثُمَّ صَوَّرْنٰكُمْ ثُمَّ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ لَمْ يَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّاجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly created you, [O mankind], and given you [human] form. Then We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam"; so they prostrated, except for Iblees. He was not of those who prostrated.

targetTranslation: Iblis/Satan (as the exception to those who prostrated)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنٰكُمْ ثُمَّ صَوَّرْنٰكُمْ ثُمَّ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ لَمْ يَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّاجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly created you, [O mankind], and given you [human] form. Then We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam"; so they prostrated, except for Iblees. He was not of those who prostrated.

targetTranslation: he exists/is (after لَمْ meaning 'he was not')
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنٰكُمْ ثُمَّ صَوَّرْنٰكُمْ ثُمَّ قُلْنَا لِلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ ٱسْجُدُوا۟ لِءَادَمَ فَسَجَدُوٓا۟ إِلَّآ إِبْلِيسَ لَمْ يَكُن مِّنَ ٱلسَّاجِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: And We have certainly created you, [O mankind], and given you [human] form. Then We said to the angels, "Prostrate to Adam"; so they prostrated, except for Iblees. He was not of those who prostrated.

ayahArabic: قَالَ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَلَّا تَسْجُدَ إِذْ أَمَرْتُكَ قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهُ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "What prevented you from prostrating when I commanded you?" [Satan] said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay [i.e., earth]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَلَّا تَسْجُدَ إِذْ أَمَرْتُكَ قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهُ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "What prevented you from prostrating when I commanded you?" [Satan] said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay [i.e., earth]."

targetTranslation: he prevented you (Allah asking Iblis what prevented him)
ayahArabic: قَالَ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَلَّا تَسْجُدَ إِذْ أَمَرْتُكَ قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهُ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍ

targetTranslation: of fire (in مِن نَّارٍ - from fire)
ayahArabic: قَالَ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَلَّا تَسْجُدَ إِذْ أَمَرْتُكَ قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهُ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍ

targetTranslation: clay (used in مِن طِينٍ meaning 'from clay')
ayahArabic: قَالَ مَا مَنَعَكَ أَلَّا تَسْجُدَ إِذْ أَمَرْتُكَ قَالَ أَنَا۠ خَيْرٌ مِّنْهُ خَلَقْتَنِى مِن نَّارٍ وَخَلَقْتَهُۥ مِن طِينٍ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "What prevented you from prostrating when I commanded you?" [Satan] said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay [i.e., earth]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَٱهْبِطْ مِنْهَا فَمَا يَكُونُ لَكَ أَن تَتَكَبَّرَ فِيهَا فَٱخْرُجْ إِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلصَّاغِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Descend from it [i.e., Paradise], for it is not for you to be arrogant therein. So get out; indeed, you are of the debased."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَٱهْبِطْ مِنْهَا فَمَا يَكُونُ لَكَ أَن تَتَكَبَّرَ فِيهَا فَٱخْرُجْ إِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلصَّاغِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Descend from it [i.e., Paradise], for it is not for you to be arrogant therein. So get out; indeed, you are of the debased."

targetTranslation: that you act proudly (in فِيهَا - in it/there)
ayahArabic: قَالَ فَٱهْبِطْ مِنْهَا فَمَا يَكُونُ لَكَ أَن تَتَكَبَّرَ فِيهَا فَٱخْرُجْ إِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلصَّاغِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Descend from it [i.e., Paradise], for it is not for you to be arrogant therein. So get out; indeed, you are of the debased."

ayahArabic: قَالَ أَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Satan] said, "Reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

ayahArabic: قَالَ أَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Satan] said, "Reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

ayahArabic: قَالَ أَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Satan] said, "Reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

targetTranslation: they are raised up (referring to all people on the Day of Resurrection)
ayahArabic: قَالَ أَنظِرْنِىٓ إِلَىٰ يَوْمِ يُبْعَثُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Satan] said, "Reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

ayahArabic: قَالَ إِنَّكَ مِنَ ٱلْمُنظَرِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Indeed, you are of those reprieved."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَبِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى لَأَقْعُدَنَّ لَهُمْ صِرٰطَكَ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمَ
ayahEnglish: [Satan] said, "Because You have put me in error, I will surely sit in wait for them [i.e., mankind] on Your straight path.

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَبِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى لَأَقْعُدَنَّ لَهُمْ صِرٰطَكَ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمَ
ayahEnglish: [Satan] said, "Because You have put me in error, I will surely sit in wait for them [i.e., mankind] on Your straight path.

ayahArabic: قَالَ فَبِمَآ أَغْوَيْتَنِى لَأَقْعُدَنَّ لَهُمْ صِرٰطَكَ ٱلْمُسْتَقِيمَ
ayahEnglish: [Satan] said, "Because You have put me in error, I will surely sit in wait for them [i.e., mankind] on Your straight path.

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ لَءَاتِيَنَّهُم مِّنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ وَعَنْ أَيْمٰنِهِمْ وَعَن شَمَآئِلِهِمْ وَلَا تَجِدُ أَكْثَرَهُمْ شٰكِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then I will come to them from before them and from behind them and on their right and on their left, and You will not find most of them grateful [to You]."

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ لَءَاتِيَنَّهُم مِّنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ وَعَنْ أَيْمٰنِهِمْ وَعَن شَمَآئِلِهِمْ وَلَا تَجِدُ أَكْثَرَهُمْ شٰكِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then I will come to them from before them and from behind them and on their right and on their left, and You will not find most of them grateful [to You]."

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ لَءَاتِيَنَّهُم مِّنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ وَعَنْ أَيْمٰنِهِمْ وَعَن شَمَآئِلِهِمْ وَلَا تَجِدُ أَكْثَرَهُمْ شٰكِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then I will come to them from before them and from behind them and on their right and on their left, and You will not find most of them grateful [to You]."

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ لَءَاتِيَنَّهُم مِّنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ وَعَنْ أَيْمٰنِهِمْ وَعَن شَمَآئِلِهِمْ وَلَا تَجِدُ أَكْثَرَهُمْ شٰكِرِينَ

ayahArabic: ثُمَّ لَءَاتِيَنَّهُم مِّنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ وَعَنْ أَيْمٰنِهِمْ وَعَن شَمَآئِلِهِمْ وَلَا تَجِدُ أَكْثَرَهُمْ شٰكِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then I will come to them from before them and from behind them and on their right and on their left, and You will not find most of them grateful [to You]."

targetTranslation: grateful people (in grammar position of object)
ayahArabic: ثُمَّ لَءَاتِيَنَّهُم مِّنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ وَعَنْ أَيْمٰنِهِمْ وَعَن شَمَآئِلِهِمْ وَلَا تَجِدُ أَكْثَرَهُمْ شٰكِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: Then I will come to them from before them and from behind them and on their right and on their left, and You will not find most of them grateful [to You]."

ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا مَذْءُومًا مَّدْحُورًا لَّمَن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Depart from it [i.e., Paradise], reproached and expelled. Whoever follows you among them - I will surely fill Hell with you, all together."

targetTranslation: Get out! (command from Allah to Shaytan)
ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا مَذْءُومًا مَّدْحُورًا لَّمَن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Depart from it [i.e., Paradise], reproached and expelled. Whoever follows you among them - I will surely fill Hell with you, all together."

targetTranslation: as one blamed and disgraced (describing how Shaytan is expelled)
ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا مَذْءُومًا مَّدْحُورًا لَّمَن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Depart from it [i.e., Paradise], reproached and expelled. Whoever follows you among them - I will surely fill Hell with you, all together."

targetTranslation: forcefully driven away (describing how اخْرُجْ/get out happens)
ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا مَذْءُومًا مَّدْحُورًا لَّمَن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Depart from it [i.e., Paradise], reproached and expelled. Whoever follows you among them - I will surely fill Hell with you, all together."

targetTranslation: he followed you (object of لَأَمْلَأَنَّ - I will surely fill)
ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا مَذْءُومًا مَّدْحُورًا لَّمَن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Depart from it [i.e., Paradise], reproached and expelled. Whoever follows you among them - I will surely fill Hell with you, all together."

targetTranslation: Hell (as the object being filled in لَأَمْلَأَنَّ - I will surely fill)
ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا مَذْءُومًا مَّدْحُورًا لَّمَن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Depart from it [i.e., Paradise], reproached and expelled. Whoever follows you among them - I will surely fill Hell with you, all together."

targetTranslation: all together (describing the people who will fill Hell)
ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱخْرُجْ مِنْهَا مَذْءُومًا مَّدْحُورًا لَّمَن تَبِعَكَ مِنْهُمْ لَأَمْلَأَنَّ جَهَنَّمَ مِنكُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Depart from it [i.e., Paradise], reproached and expelled. Whoever follows you among them - I will surely fill Hell with you, all together."

ayahArabic: وَيٰٓـَٔادَمُ ٱسْكُنْ أَنتَ وَزَوْجُكَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ فَكُلَا مِنْ حَيْثُ شِئْتُمَا وَلَا تَقْرَبَا هٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةَ فَتَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And "O Adam, dwell, you and your wife, in Paradise and eat from wherever you will but do not approach this tree, lest you be among the wrongdoers."

targetTranslation: you (when talking to one male, subject of اسْكُنْ)
ayahArabic: وَيٰٓـَٔادَمُ ٱسْكُنْ أَنتَ وَزَوْجُكَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ فَكُلَا مِنْ حَيْثُ شِئْتُمَا وَلَا تَقْرَبَا هٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةَ فَتَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And "O Adam, dwell, you and your wife, in Paradise and eat from wherever you will but do not approach this tree, lest you be among the wrongdoers."

targetTranslation: wherever (in relation to شِئْتُمَا - you both wish)
ayahArabic: وَيٰٓـَٔادَمُ ٱسْكُنْ أَنتَ وَزَوْجُكَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ فَكُلَا مِنْ حَيْثُ شِئْتُمَا وَلَا تَقْرَبَا هٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةَ فَتَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And "O Adam, dwell, you and your wife, in Paradise and eat from wherever you will but do not approach this tree, lest you be among the wrongdoers."

ayahArabic: وَيٰٓـَٔادَمُ ٱسْكُنْ أَنتَ وَزَوْجُكَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ فَكُلَا مِنْ حَيْثُ شِئْتُمَا وَلَا تَقْرَبَا هٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةَ فَتَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And "O Adam, dwell, you and your wife, in Paradise and eat from wherever you will but do not approach this tree, lest you be among the wrongdoers."

ayahArabic: وَيٰٓـَٔادَمُ ٱسْكُنْ أَنتَ وَزَوْجُكَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ فَكُلَا مِنْ حَيْثُ شِئْتُمَا وَلَا تَقْرَبَا هٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةَ فَتَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And "O Adam, dwell, you and your wife, in Paradise and eat from wherever you will but do not approach this tree, lest you be among the wrongdoers."

ayahArabic: فَوَسْوَسَ لَهُمَا ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ لِيُبْدِىَ لَهُمَا مَا وُۥرِىَ عَنْهُمَا مِن سَوْءٰتِهِمَا وَقَالَ مَا نَهَىٰكُمَا رَبُّكُمَا عَنْ هٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةِ إِلَّآ أَن تَكُونَا مَلَكَيْنِ أَوْ تَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلْخٰلِدِينَ
ayahEnglish: But Satan whispered to them to make apparent to them that which was concealed from them of their private parts. He said, "Your Lord did not forbid you this tree except that you become angels or become of the immortal."

ayahArabic: فَوَسْوَسَ لَهُمَا ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ لِيُبْدِىَ لَهُمَا مَا وُۥرِىَ عَنْهُمَا مِن سَوْءٰتِهِمَا وَقَالَ مَا نَهَىٰكُمَا رَبُّكُمَا عَنْ هٰذِهِ ٱلشَّجَرَةِ إِلَّآ أَن تَكُونَا مَلَكَيْنِ أَوْ تَكُونَا مِنَ ٱلْخٰلِدِينَ

targetTranslation: he prevented/stopped you both (referring to Adam and Eve)

targetTranslation: your (both of you) nurturer (subject of قَالَ)

targetTranslation: you two exist/become (addressing Adam and Eve)

ayahEnglish: But Satan whispered to them to make apparent to them that which was concealed from them of their private parts. He said, "Your Lord did not forbid you this tree except that you become angels or become of the immortal."

targetTranslation: they both tasted (referring to Adam and Eve)
ayahArabic: فَدَلَّىٰهُمَا بِغُرُورٍ فَلَمَّا ذَاقَا ٱلشَّجَرَةَ بَدَتْ لَهُمَا سَوْءٰتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخْصِفَانِ عَلَيْهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ وَنَادَىٰهُمَا رَبُّهُمَآ أَلَمْ أَنْهَكُمَا عَن تِلْكُمَا ٱلشَّجَرَةِ وَأَقُل لَّكُمَآ إِنَّ ٱلشَّيْطٰنَ لَكُمَا عَدُوٌّ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: So he made them fall, through deception. And when they tasted of the tree, their private parts became apparent to them, and they began to fasten together over themselves from the leaves of Paradise. And their Lord called to them, "Did I not forbid you from that tree and tell you that Satan is to you a clear enemy?"

ayahArabic: فَدَلَّىٰهُمَا بِغُرُورٍ فَلَمَّا ذَاقَا ٱلشَّجَرَةَ بَدَتْ لَهُمَا سَوْءٰتُهُمَا وَطَفِقَا يَخْصِفَانِ عَلَيْهِمَا مِن وَرَقِ ٱلْجَنَّةِ وَنَادَىٰهُمَا رَبُّهُمَآ أَلَمْ أَنْهَكُمَا عَن تِلْكُمَا ٱلشَّجَرَةِ وَأَقُل لَّكُمَآ إِنَّ ٱلشَّيْطٰنَ لَكُمَا عَدُوٌّ مُّبِينٌ

ayahArabic: قَالَا رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَآ أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْخٰسِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers."

targetTranslation: Our Lord! (speaking to Allah in the ayah)
ayahArabic: قَالَا رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَآ أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْخٰسِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers."

targetTranslation: we wronged (subject of قَالَا - they both said)
ayahArabic: قَالَا رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَآ أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْخٰسِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers."

ayahArabic: قَالَا رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَآ أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْخٰسِرِينَ

ayahArabic: قَالَا رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَآ أَنفُسَنَا وَإِن لَّمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنَ ٱلْخٰسِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "Our Lord, we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy upon us, we will surely be among the losers."

ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱهْبِطُوا۟ بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ وَلَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُسْتَقَرٌّ وَمَتٰعٌ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Descend, being to one another enemies. And for you on the earth is a place of settlement and enjoyment [i.e., provision] for a time."

ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱهْبِطُوا۟ بَعْضُكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ عَدُوٌّ وَلَكُمْ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ مُسْتَقَرٌّ وَمَتٰعٌ إِلَىٰ حِينٍ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] said, "Descend, being to one another enemies. And for you on the earth is a place of settlement and enjoyment [i.e., provision] for a time."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فِيهَا تَحْيَوْنَ وَفِيهَا تَمُوتُونَ وَمِنْهَا تُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Therein you will live, and therein you will die, and from it you will be brought forth."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فِيهَا تَحْيَوْنَ وَفِيهَا تَمُوتُونَ وَمِنْهَا تُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Therein you will live, and therein you will die, and from it you will be brought forth."

ayahArabic: قَالَ فِيهَا تَحْيَوْنَ وَفِيهَا تَمُوتُونَ وَمِنْهَا تُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Therein you will live, and therein you will die, and from it you will be brought forth."

targetTranslation: you (all) are made to exit (from it)
ayahArabic: قَالَ فِيهَا تَحْيَوْنَ وَفِيهَا تَمُوتُونَ وَمِنْهَا تُخْرَجُونَ
ayahEnglish: He said, "Therein you will live, and therein you will die, and from it you will be brought forth."

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ قَدْ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكُمْ لِبَاسًا يُوٰرِى سَوْءٰتِكُمْ وَرِيشًا وَلِبَاسُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ ذٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ ذٰلِكَ مِنْ ءَايٰتِ ٱللَّهِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَذَّكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: O children of Adam, We have bestowed upon you clothing to conceal your private parts and as adornment. But the clothing of righteousness - that is best. That is from the signs of Allāh that perhaps they will remember.

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ قَدْ أَنزَلْنَا عَلَيْكُمْ لِبَاسًا يُوٰرِى سَوْءٰتِكُمْ وَرِيشًا وَلِبَاسُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ ذٰلِكَ خَيْرٌ ذٰلِكَ مِنْ ءَايٰتِ ٱللَّهِ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَذَّكَّرُونَ

targetTranslation: Adam (as the object of يٰبَنِىٓ - O children of)
ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ لَا يَفْتِنَنَّكُمُ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ كَمَآ أَخْرَجَ أَبَوَيْكُم مِّنَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ يَنزِعُ عَنْهُمَا لِبَاسَهُمَا لِيُرِيَهُمَا سَوْءٰتِهِمَآ إِنَّهُۥ يَرَىٰكُمْ هُوَ وَقَبِيلُهُۥ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا تَرَوْنَهُمْ إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا ٱلشَّيٰطِينَ أَوْلِيَآءَ لِلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: O children of Adam, let not Satan tempt you as he removed your parents from Paradise, stripping them of their clothing to show them their private parts. Indeed, he sees you, he and his tribe, from where you do not see them. Indeed, We have made the devils allies to those who do not believe.

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ لَا يَفْتِنَنَّكُمُ ٱلشَّيْطٰنُ كَمَآ أَخْرَجَ أَبَوَيْكُم مِّنَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ يَنزِعُ عَنْهُمَا لِبَاسَهُمَا لِيُرِيَهُمَا سَوْءٰتِهِمَآ إِنَّهُۥ يَرَىٰكُمْ هُوَ وَقَبِيلُهُۥ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا تَرَوْنَهُمْ إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا ٱلشَّيٰطِينَ أَوْلِيَآءَ لِلَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ

Indeed, he sees you, he and his tribe, from where you do not see them. Indeed, We have made the devils allies to those who do not believe.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا فَعَلُوا۟ فٰحِشَةً قَالُوا۟ وَجَدْنَا عَلَيْهَآ ءَابَآءَنَا وَٱللَّهُ أَمَرَنَا بِهَا قُلْ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَأْمُرُ بِٱلْفَحْشَآءِ أَتَقُولُونَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And when they commit an immorality, they say, "We found our fathers doing it, and Allāh has ordered us to do it." Say, "Indeed, Allāh does not order immorality. Do you say about Allāh that which you do not know?"

targetTranslation: an immoral act/deed (object of فَعَلُوا - they did)

targetTranslation: what (asking about what they do not know)

targetTranslation: you (all) know (addressing multiple people in أَتَقُولُونَ)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا فَعَلُوا۟ فٰحِشَةً قَالُوا۟ وَجَدْنَا عَلَيْهَآ ءَابَآءَنَا وَٱللَّهُ أَمَرَنَا بِهَا قُلْ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَا يَأْمُرُ بِٱلْفَحْشَآءِ أَتَقُولُونَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ

ayahArabic: قُلْ أَمَرَ رَبِّى بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ وُجُوهَكُمْ عِندَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَٱدْعُوهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ كَمَا بَدَأَكُمْ تَعُودُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "My Lord has ordered justice and that you direct yourselves [to the Qiblah] at every place [or time] of prostration, and invoke Him, sincere to Him in religion." Just as He originated you, you will return [to life] -

targetTranslation: he commanded (subject of قُلْ - he said)
ayahArabic: قُلْ أَمَرَ رَبِّى بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ وُجُوهَكُمْ عِندَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَٱدْعُوهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ كَمَا بَدَأَكُمْ تَعُودُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "My Lord has ordered justice and that you direct yourselves [to the Qiblah] at every place [or time] of prostration, and invoke Him, sincere to Him in religion." Just as He originated you, you will return [to life] -

targetTranslation: my Lord (the one speaking to Allah)

ayahArabic: قُلْ أَمَرَ رَبِّى بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ وُجُوهَكُمْ عِندَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَٱدْعُوهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ كَمَا بَدَأَكُمْ تَعُودُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "My Lord has ordered justice and that you direct yourselves [to the Qiblah] at every place [or time] of prostration, and invoke Him, sincere to Him in religion." Just as He originated you, you will return [to life] -

ayahArabic: قُلْ أَمَرَ رَبِّى بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ وُجُوهَكُمْ عِندَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَٱدْعُوهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ كَمَا بَدَأَكُمْ تَعُودُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "My Lord has ordered justice and that you direct yourselves [to the Qiblah] at every place [or time] of prostration, and invoke Him, sincere to Him in religion." Just as He originated you, you will return [to life] -

ayahArabic: قُلْ أَمَرَ رَبِّى بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ وُجُوهَكُمْ عِندَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَٱدْعُوهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ كَمَا بَدَأَكُمْ تَعُودُونَ

ayahArabic: قُلْ أَمَرَ رَبِّى بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ وُجُوهَكُمْ عِندَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَٱدْعُوهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ كَمَا بَدَأَكُمْ تَعُودُونَ

targetTranslation: you (all) will return (as He began you)
ayahArabic: قُلْ أَمَرَ رَبِّى بِٱلْقِسْطِ وَأَقِيمُوا۟ وُجُوهَكُمْ عِندَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَٱدْعُوهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ ٱلدِّينَ كَمَا بَدَأَكُمْ تَعُودُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, [O Muḥammad], "My Lord has ordered justice and that you direct yourselves [to the Qiblah] at every place [or time] of prostration, and invoke Him, sincere to Him in religion." Just as He originated you, you will return [to life] -

targetTranslation: a distinct group (object of هَدَىٰ - He guided)
ayahArabic: فَرِيقًا هَدَىٰ وَفَرِيقًا حَقَّ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلضَّلٰلَةُ إِنَّهُمُ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ ٱلشَّيٰطِينَ أَوْلِيَآءَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُم مُّهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: A group [of you] He guided, and a group deserved [to be in] error. Indeed, they [i.e., the latter] had taken the devils as allies instead of Allāh while they thought that they were guided.

ayahArabic: فَرِيقًا هَدَىٰ وَفَرِيقًا حَقَّ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلضَّلٰلَةُ إِنَّهُمُ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ ٱلشَّيٰطِينَ أَوْلِيَآءَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُم مُّهْتَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: A group [of you] He guided, and a group deserved [to be in] error. Indeed, they [i.e., the latter] had taken the devils as allies instead of Allāh while they thought that they were guided.

ayahArabic: فَرِيقًا هَدَىٰ وَفَرِيقًا حَقَّ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلضَّلٰلَةُ إِنَّهُمُ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ ٱلشَّيٰطِينَ أَوْلِيَآءَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُم مُّهْتَدُونَ

ayahArabic: فَرِيقًا هَدَىٰ وَفَرِيقًا حَقَّ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلضَّلٰلَةُ إِنَّهُمُ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ ٱلشَّيٰطِينَ أَوْلِيَآءَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ وَيَحْسَبُونَ أَنَّهُم مُّهْتَدُونَ

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ خُذُوا۟ زِينَتَكُمْ عِندَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَكُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ وَلَا تُسْرِفُوٓا۟ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayahEnglish: O children of Adam, take your adornment [i.e., wear your clothing] at every masjid, and eat and drink, but be not excessive. Indeed, He likes not those who commit excess.

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ خُذُوا۟ زِينَتَكُمْ عِندَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَكُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ وَلَا تُسْرِفُوٓا۟ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayahEnglish: O children of Adam, take your adornment [i.e., wear your clothing] at every masjid, and eat and drink, but be not excessive. Indeed, He likes not those who commit excess.

targetTranslation: your (all of you) decoration (object of خُذُوا - take)

targetTranslation: you (all) go beyond bounds (as a prohibition with لا)
ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ خُذُوا۟ زِينَتَكُمْ عِندَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَكُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ وَلَا تُسْرِفُوٓا۟ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ خُذُوا۟ زِينَتَكُمْ عِندَ كُلِّ مَسْجِدٍ وَكُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ وَلَا تُسْرِفُوٓا۟ إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayahEnglish: O children of Adam, take your adornment [i.e., wear your clothing] at every masjid, and eat and drink, but be not excessive. Indeed, He likes not those who commit excess.

ayahArabic: قُلْ مَنْ حَرَّمَ زِينَةَ ٱللَّهِ ٱلَّتِىٓ أَخْرَجَ لِعِبَادِهِۦ وَٱلطَّيِّبٰتِ مِنَ ٱلرِّزْقِ قُلْ هِىَ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ فِى ٱلْحَيَوٰةِ ٱلدُّنْيَا خَالِصَةً يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ كَذٰلِكَ نُفَصِّلُ ٱلْءَايٰتِ لِقَوْمٍ يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "Who has forbidden the adornment of [i.e., from] Allāh which He has produced for His servants and the good [lawful] things of provision?" Say, "They are for those who believed during the life of this world, exclusively [for them] on the Day of Resurrection." Thus do We detail the verses for a people who know.

targetTranslation: who (asking about who forbade in حَرَّمَ)

ayahArabic: قُلْ إِنَّمَا حَرَّمَ رَبِّىَ ٱلْفَوٰحِشَ مَا ظَهَرَ مِنْهَا وَمَا بَطَنَ وَٱلْإِثْمَ وَٱلْبَغْىَ بِغَيْرِ ٱلْحَقِّ وَأَن تُشْرِكُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ مَا لَمْ يُنَزِّلْ بِهِۦ سُلْطٰنًا وَأَن تَقُولُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Say, "My Lord has only forbidden immoralities - what is apparent of them and what is concealed - and sin, and oppression without right, and that you associate with Allāh that for which He has not sent down authority, and that you say about Allāh that which you do not know."

targetTranslation: a community (belonging to وَلِكُلِّ - and for every)
ayahArabic: وَلِكُلِّ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلٌ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمْ لَا يَسْتَأْخِرُونَ سَاعَةً وَلَا يَسْتَقْدِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for every nation is a [specified] term. So when their time has come, they will not remain behind an hour, nor will they precede [it].

ayahArabic: وَلِكُلِّ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلٌ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمْ لَا يَسْتَأْخِرُونَ سَاعَةً وَلَا يَسْتَقْدِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for every nation is a [specified] term. So when their time has come, they will not remain behind an hour, nor will they precede [it].

ayahArabic: وَلِكُلِّ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلٌ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمْ لَا يَسْتَأْخِرُونَ سَاعَةً وَلَا يَسْتَقْدِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for every nation is a [specified] term. So when their time has come, they will not remain behind an hour, nor will they precede [it].

ayahArabic: وَلِكُلِّ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلٌ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمْ لَا يَسْتَأْخِرُونَ سَاعَةً وَلَا يَسْتَقْدِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for every nation is a [specified] term. So when their time has come, they will not remain behind an hour, nor will they precede [it].

targetTranslation: they seek to delay (related to أَجَلُهُمْ/their appointed time)
ayahArabic: وَلِكُلِّ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلٌ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمْ لَا يَسْتَأْخِرُونَ سَاعَةً وَلَا يَسْتَقْدِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for every nation is a [specified] term. So when their time has come, they will not remain behind an hour, nor will they precede [it].

targetTranslation: an hour/moment (object of يَسْتَأْخِرُونَ - they delay)
ayahArabic: وَلِكُلِّ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلٌ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمْ لَا يَسْتَأْخِرُونَ سَاعَةً وَلَا يَسْتَقْدِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for every nation is a [specified] term. So when their time has come, they will not remain behind an hour, nor will they precede [it].

targetTranslation: they seek to go forward/ahead (negated by لا)
ayahArabic: وَلِكُلِّ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلٌ فَإِذَا جَآءَ أَجَلُهُمْ لَا يَسْتَأْخِرُونَ سَاعَةً وَلَا يَسْتَقْدِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for every nation is a [specified] term. So when their time has come, they will not remain behind an hour, nor will they precede [it].

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ إِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُمْ رُسُلٌ مِّنكُمْ يَقُصُّونَ عَلَيْكُمْ ءَايٰتِى فَمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰ وَأَصْلَحَ فَلَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
ayahEnglish: O children of Adam, if there come to you messengers from among you relating to you My verses [i.e., scriptures and laws], then whoever fears Allāh and reforms - there will be no fear concerning them, nor will they grieve.

targetTranslation: he will definitely come to you all (referring to رُسُلٌ - messengers)
ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ إِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُمْ رُسُلٌ مِّنكُمْ يَقُصُّونَ عَلَيْكُمْ ءَايٰتِى فَمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰ وَأَصْلَحَ فَلَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ إِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُمْ رُسُلٌ مِّنكُمْ يَقُصُّونَ عَلَيْكُمْ ءَايٰتِى فَمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰ وَأَصْلَحَ فَلَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ

targetTranslation: they tell in detail (about ءَايٰتِى/My signs)

ayahEnglish: O children of Adam, if there come to you messengers from among you relating to you My verses [i.e., scriptures and laws], then whoever fears Allāh and reforms - there will be no fear concerning them, nor will they grieve.

ayahArabic: يٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ إِمَّا يَأْتِيَنَّكُمْ رُسُلٌ مِّنكُمْ يَقُصُّونَ عَلَيْكُمْ ءَايٰتِى فَمَنِ ٱتَّقَىٰ وَأَصْلَحَ فَلَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا هُمْ يَحْزَنُونَ
ayahEnglish: O children of Adam, if there come to you messengers from among you relating to you My verses [i.e., scriptures and laws], then whoever fears Allāh and reforms - there will be no fear concerning them, nor will they grieve.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ عَنْهَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ هُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: But the ones who deny Our verses and are arrogant toward them - those are the companions of the Fire; they will abide therein eternally.

targetTranslation: those (pointing to people far away) (subject of أَصْحٰبُ)
ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ عَنْهَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ هُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: But the ones who deny Our verses and are arrogant toward them - those are the companions of the Fire; they will abide therein eternally.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ عَنْهَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ هُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: But the ones who deny Our verses and are arrogant toward them - those are the companions of the Fire; they will abide therein eternally.

targetTranslation: they/them (masculine) (refers to الَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا - those who denied)
ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ عَنْهَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ هُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: But the ones who deny Our verses and are arrogant toward them - those are the companions of the Fire; they will abide therein eternally.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ عَنْهَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ هُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: But the ones who deny Our verses and are arrogant toward them - those are the companions of the Fire; they will abide therein eternally.

targetTranslation: more/most unjust (subject of who in فَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ)
ayahArabic: فَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا أَوْ كَذَّبَ بِـَٔايٰتِهِۦٓ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ يَنَالُهُمْ نَصِيبُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْكِتٰبِ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَتْهُمْ رُسُلُنَا يَتَوَفَّوْنَهُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ قَالُوا۟ ضَلُّوا۟ عَنَّا وَشَهِدُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ أَنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ كٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And who is more unjust than one who invents about Allāh a lie or denies His verses? Those will attain their portion of the decree until, when Our messengers [i.e., angels] come to them to take them in death, they will say, "Where are those you used to invoke besides Allāh?" They will say, "They have departed from us," and will bear witness against themselves that they were disbelievers.

ayahArabic: فَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا أَوْ كَذَّبَ بِـَٔايٰتِهِۦٓ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ يَنَالُهُمْ نَصِيبُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْكِتٰبِ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَتْهُمْ رُسُلُنَا يَتَوَفَّوْنَهُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ قَالُوا۟ ضَلُّوا۟ عَنَّا وَشَهِدُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ أَنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ كٰفِرِينَ

Those will attain their portion of the decree until, when Our messengers [i.e., angels] come to them to take them in death, they will say, "Where are those you used to invoke besides Allāh?" Those will attain their portion of the decree until, when Our messengers [i.e., angels] come to them to take them in death, they will say, "Where are those you used to invoke besides Allāh?" They will say, "They have departed from us," and will bear witness against themselves that they were disbelievers.

targetTranslation: those who reject truth (acted upon by كَانُوا)
ayahArabic: فَمَنْ أَظْلَمُ مِمَّنِ ٱفْتَرَىٰ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبًا أَوْ كَذَّبَ بِـَٔايٰتِهِۦٓ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ يَنَالُهُمْ نَصِيبُهُم مِّنَ ٱلْكِتٰبِ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا جَآءَتْهُمْ رُسُلُنَا يَتَوَفَّوْنَهُمْ قَالُوٓا۟ أَيْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ قَالُوا۟ ضَلُّوا۟ عَنَّا وَشَهِدُوا۟ عَلَىٰٓ أَنفُسِهِمْ أَنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ كٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And who is more unjust than one who invents about Allāh a lie or denies His verses? Those will attain their portion of the decree until, when Our messengers [i.e., angels] come to them to take them in death, they will say, "Where are those you used to invoke besides Allāh?" They will say, "They have departed from us," and will bear witness against themselves that they were disbelievers.

ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱدْخُلُوا۟ فِىٓ أُمَمٍ قَدْ خَلَتْ مِن قَبْلِكُم مِّنَ ٱلْجِنِّ وَٱلْإِنسِ فِى ٱلنَّارِ كُلَّمَا دَخَلَتْ أُمَّةٌ لَّعَنَتْ أُخْتَهَا حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا ٱدَّارَكُوا۟ فِيهَا جَمِيعًا قَالَتْ أُخْرَىٰهُمْ لِأُولَىٰهُمْ رَبَّنَا هٰٓؤُلَآءِ أَضَلُّونَا فَـَٔاتِهِمْ عَذَابًا ضِعْفًا مِّنَ ٱلنَّارِ قَالَ لِكُلٍّ ضِعْفٌ وَلٰكِن لَّا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh] will say, "Enter among nations which had passed on before you of jinn and mankind into the Fire." Every time a nation enters, it will curse its sister until, when they have all overtaken one another therein, the last of them will say about the first of them, "Our Lord, these had misled us, so give them a double punishment of the Fire." He will say, "For each is double, but you do not know."

targetTranslation: enter! (command to all of you) (after قَالَ - he said)

ayahEnglish: [Allāh] will say, "Enter among nations which had passed on before you of jinn and mankind into the Fire." targetTranslation: their first ones (referring to the disbelievers speaking to each other)
ayahArabic: وَقَالَتْ أُولَىٰهُمْ لِأُخْرَىٰهُمْ فَمَا كَانَ لَكُمْ عَلَيْنَا مِن فَضْلٍ فَذُوقُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْسِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the first of them will say to the last of them, "Then you had not any favor over us, so taste the punishment for what you used to earn."

targetTranslation: he was/existed/happened (describing the state of فَضْلٍ)
ayahArabic: وَقَالَتْ أُولَىٰهُمْ لِأُخْرَىٰهُمْ فَمَا كَانَ لَكُمْ عَلَيْنَا مِن فَضْلٍ فَذُوقُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْسِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the first of them will say to the last of them, "Then you had not any favor over us, so taste the punishment for what you used to earn."

targetTranslation: any extra gift or special favor (after مِن)
ayahArabic: وَقَالَتْ أُولَىٰهُمْ لِأُخْرَىٰهُمْ فَمَا كَانَ لَكُمْ عَلَيْنَا مِن فَضْلٍ فَذُوقُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْسِبُونَ

targetTranslation: you all earn (referring to the disbelievers being addressed in this ayah)
ayahArabic: وَقَالَتْ أُولَىٰهُمْ لِأُخْرَىٰهُمْ فَمَا كَانَ لَكُمْ عَلَيْنَا مِن فَضْلٍ فَذُوقُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْسِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the first of them will say to the last of them, "Then you had not any favor over us, so taste the punishment for what you used to earn."

targetTranslation: those who (subject of كَذَّبُوا - they denied)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ عَنْهَا لَا تُفَتَّحُ لَهُمْ أَبْوٰبُ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَلَا يَدْخُلُونَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ حَتَّىٰ يَلِجَ ٱلْجَمَلُ فِى سَمِّ ٱلْخِيَاطِ وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who deny Our verses and are arrogant toward them - the gates of Heaven will not be opened for them, nor will they enter Paradise until a camel enters into the eye of a needle [i.e., never]. And thus do We recompense the criminals.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ عَنْهَا لَا تُفَتَّحُ لَهُمْ أَبْوٰبُ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَلَا يَدْخُلُونَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ حَتَّىٰ يَلِجَ ٱلْجَمَلُ فِى سَمِّ ٱلْخِيَاطِ وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ عَنْهَا لَا تُفَتَّحُ لَهُمْ أَبْوٰبُ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَلَا يَدْخُلُونَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ حَتَّىٰ يَلِجَ ٱلْجَمَلُ فِى سَمِّ ٱلْخِيَاطِ وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who deny Our verses and are arrogant toward them - the gates of Heaven will not be opened for them, nor will they enter Paradise until a camel enters into the eye of a needle [i.e., never]. And thus do We recompense the criminals.

ayahArabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا وَٱسْتَكْبَرُوا۟ عَنْهَا لَا تُفَتَّحُ لَهُمْ أَبْوٰبُ ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَلَا يَدْخُلُونَ ٱلْجَنَّةَ حَتَّىٰ يَلِجَ ٱلْجَمَلُ فِى سَمِّ ٱلْخِيَاطِ وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, those who deny Our verses and are arrogant toward them - the gates of Heaven will not be opened for them, nor will they enter Paradise until a camel enters into the eye of a needle [i.e., never]. And thus do We recompense the criminals.

ayahArabic: لَهُم مِّن جَهَنَّمَ مِهَادٌ وَمِن فَوْقِهِمْ غَوَاشٍ وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: They will have from Hell a bed and over them coverings [of fire]. And thus do We recompense the wrongdoers.

ayahArabic: لَهُم مِّن جَهَنَّمَ مِهَادٌ وَمِن فَوْقِهِمْ غَوَاشٍ وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: They will have from Hell a bed and over them coverings [of fire]. And thus do We recompense the wrongdoers.

ayahEnglish: They will have from Hell a bed and over them coverings [of fire]. And thus do We recompense the wrongdoers.

ayahArabic: لَهُم مِّن جَهَنَّمَ مِهَادٌ وَمِن فَوْقِهِمْ غَوَاشٍ وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: They will have from Hell a bed and over them coverings [of fire]. And thus do We recompense the wrongdoers.

ayahArabic: لَهُم مِّن جَهَنَّمَ مِهَادٌ وَمِن فَوْقِهِمْ غَوَاشٍ وَكَذٰلِكَ نَجْزِى ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: They will have from Hell a bed and over them coverings [of fire]. And thus do We recompense the wrongdoers.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ لَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ هُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: But those who believed and did righteous deeds - We charge no soul except [within] its capacity. Those are the companions of Paradise; they will abide therein eternally.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ لَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ هُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: But those who believed and did righteous deeds - We charge no soul except [within] its capacity. Those are the companions of Paradise; they will abide therein eternally.

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ لَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ هُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ

ayahArabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّالِحٰتِ لَا نُكَلِّفُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَآ أُو۟لٰٓئِكَ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ هُمْ فِيهَا خٰلِدُونَ

ayahArabic: وَنَزَعْنَا مَا فِى صُدُورِهِم مِّنْ غِلٍّ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهِمُ ٱلْأَنْهٰرُ وَقَالُوا۟ ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِى هَدَىٰنَا لِهٰذَا وَمَا كُنَّا لِنَهْتَدِىَ لَوْلَآ أَنْ هَدَىٰنَا ٱللَّهُ لَقَدْ جَآءَتْ رُسُلُ رَبِّنَا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَنُودُوٓا۟ أَن تِلْكُمُ ٱلْجَنَّةُ أُورِثْتُمُوهَا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We will have removed whatever is within their breasts of resentment, [while] flowing beneath them are rivers. And they will say, "Praise to Allāh, who has guided us to this; and we would never have been guided if Allāh had not guided us. Certainly the messengers of our Lord had come with the truth." And they will be called, "This is Paradise, which you have been made to inherit for what you used to do."

ayahArabic: وَنَادَىٰٓ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ أَصْحٰبَ ٱلنَّارِ أَن قَدْ وَجَدْنَا مَا وَعَدَنَا رَبُّنَا حَقًّا فَهَلْ وَجَدتُّم مَّا وَعَدَ رَبُّكُمْ حَقًّا قَالُوا۟ نَعَمْ فَأَذَّنَ مُؤَذِّنٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ أَن لَّعْنَةُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَى ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And the companions of Paradise will call out to the companions of the Fire, "We have already found what our Lord promised us to be true. Have you found what your Lord promised to be true?" They will say, "Yes." Then an announcer will announce among them, "The curse of Allāh shall be upon the wrongdoers

ayahArabic: وَنَادَىٰٓ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْجَنَّةِ أَصْحٰبَ ٱلنَّارِ أَن قَدْ وَجَدْنَا مَا وَعَدَنَا رَبُّنَا حَقًّا فَهَلْ وَجَدتُّم مَّا وَعَدَ رَبُّكُمْ حَقًّا قَالُوا۟ نَعَمْ فَأَذَّنَ مُؤَذِّنٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ أَن لَّعْنَةُ ٱللَّهِ عَلَى ٱلظَّالِمِينَ

Have you found what your Lord promised to be true?" They will say, "Yes." Then an announcer will announce among them, "The curse of Allāh shall be upon the wrongdoers

Have you found what your Lord promised to be true?" They will say, "Yes." Then an announcer will announce among them, "The curse of Allāh shall be upon the wrongdoers

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَصُدُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَيَبْغُونَهَا عِوَجًا وَهُم بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ كٰفِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who averted [people] from the way of Allāh and sought to make it [seem] deviant while they were, concerning the Hereafter, disbelievers."

targetTranslation: they block/prevent (referring to ٱلَّذِينَ - those who)

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ يَصُدُّونَ عَن سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِ وَيَبْغُونَهَا عِوَجًا وَهُم بِٱلْءَاخِرَةِ كٰفِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who averted [people] from the way of Allāh and sought to make it [seem] deviant while they were, concerning the Hereafter, disbelievers."

ayahArabic: وَبَيْنَهُمَا حِجَابٌ وَعَلَى ٱلْأَعْرَافِ رِجَالٌ يَعْرِفُونَ كُلًّۢا بِسِيمَىٰهُمْ وَنَادَوْا۟ أَصْحٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ أَن سَلٰمٌ عَلَيْكُمْ لَمْ يَدْخُلُوهَا وَهُمْ يَطْمَعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And between them will be a partition [i.e., wall], and on [its] elevations are men who recognize all by their mark. And they call out to the companions of Paradise, "Peace be upon you." They have not [yet] entered it, but they long intensely.

ayahArabic: وَبَيْنَهُمَا حِجَابٌ وَعَلَى ٱلْأَعْرَافِ رِجَالٌ يَعْرِفُونَ كُلًّۢا بِسِيمَىٰهُمْ وَنَادَوْا۟ أَصْحٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ أَن سَلٰمٌ عَلَيْكُمْ لَمْ يَدْخُلُوهَا وَهُمْ يَطْمَعُونَ

targetTranslation: were turned (subject is أَبْصٰرُهُمْ - their eyes)
ayahArabic: وَإِذَا صُرِفَتْ أَبْصٰرُهُمْ تِلْقَآءَ أَصْحٰبِ ٱلنَّارِ قَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا مَعَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ
ayahEnglish: And when their eyes are turned toward the companions of the Fire, they say, "Our Lord, do not place us with the wrongdoing people."

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا صُرِفَتْ أَبْصٰرُهُمْ تِلْقَآءَ أَصْحٰبِ ٱلنَّارِ قَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَا لَا تَجْعَلْنَا مَعَ ٱلْقَوْمِ ٱلظَّالِمِينَ

ayahArabic: وَنَادَىٰٓ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْأَعْرَافِ رِجَالًا يَعْرِفُونَهُم بِسِيمَىٰهُمْ قَالُوا۟ مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنكُمْ جَمْعُكُمْ وَمَا كُنتُمْ تَسْتَكْبِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the companions of the Elevations will call to men [within Hell] whom they recognize by their mark, saying, "Of no avail to you was your gathering and [the fact] that you were arrogant."

targetTranslation: men (as the objects being called out to by أَصْحٰبُ ٱلْأَعْرَافِ)

targetTranslation: are these ones? (referring to الَّذِينَ - those who)
ayahArabic: أَهٰٓؤُلَآءِ ٱلَّذِينَ أَقْسَمْتُمْ لَا يَنَالُهُمُ ٱللَّهُ بِرَحْمَةٍ ٱدْخُلُوا۟ ٱلْجَنَّةَ لَا خَوْفٌ عَلَيْكُمْ وَلَآ أَنتُمْ تَحْزَنُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Allāh will say], "Are these the ones whom you [inhabitants of Hell] swore that Allāh would never offer them mercy? Enter Paradise, [O people of the Elevations]. No fear will there be concerning you, nor will you grieve."

ayahArabic: وَنَادَىٰٓ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ أَصْحٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ أَنْ أَفِيضُوا۟ عَلَيْنَا مِنَ ٱلْمَآءِ أَوْ مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ حَرَّمَهُمَا عَلَى ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: And the companions of the Fire will call to the companions of Paradise, "Pour upon us some water or from whatever Allāh has provided you." They will say, "Indeed, Allāh has forbidden them both to the disbelievers

ayahArabic: وَنَادَىٰٓ أَصْحٰبُ ٱلنَّارِ أَصْحٰبَ ٱلْجَنَّةِ أَنْ أَفِيضُوا۟ عَلَيْنَا مِنَ ٱلْمَآءِ أَوْ مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ حَرَّمَهُمَا عَلَى ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ

ayahArabic: ٱلَّذِينَ ٱتَّخَذُوا۟ دِينَهُمْ لَهْوًا وَلَعِبًا وَغَرَّتْهُمُ ٱلْحَيَوٰةُ ٱلدُّنْيَا فَٱلْيَوْمَ نَنسَىٰهُمْ كَمَا نَسُوا۟ لِقَآءَ يَوْمِهِمْ هٰذَا وَمَا كَانُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَا يَجْحَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: Who took their religion as distraction and amusement and whom the worldly life deluded." So today We will forget them just as they forgot the meeting of this Day of theirs and for having rejected Our verses.

targetTranslation: we came to them (object of جِئْنٰ)
ayahArabic: وَلَقَدْ جِئْنٰهُم بِكِتٰبٍ فَصَّلْنٰهُ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍ هُدًى وَرَحْمَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We had certainly brought them a Book which We detailed by knowledge - as guidance and mercy to a people who believe.

targetTranslation: we explained it thoroughly in detail (object of جِئْنٰهُم)

ayahEnglish: And We had certainly brought them a Book which We detailed by knowledge - as guidance and mercy to a people who believe.

targetTranslation: they look/watch (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier in the ayah)
ayahArabic: هَلْ يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا تَأْوِيلَهُۥ يَوْمَ يَأْتِى تَأْوِيلُهُۥ يَقُولُ ٱلَّذِينَ نَسُوهُ مِن قَبْلُ قَدْ جَآءَتْ رُسُلُ رَبِّنَا بِٱلْحَقِّ فَهَل لَّنَا مِن شُفَعَآءَ فَيَشْفَعُوا۟ لَنَآ أَوْ نُرَدُّ فَنَعْمَلَ غَيْرَ ٱلَّذِى كُنَّا نَعْمَلُ قَدْ خَسِرُوٓا۟ أَنفُسَهُمْ وَضَلَّ عَنْهُم مَّا كَانُوا۟ يَفْتَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they await except its result? The Day its result comes, those who had ignored it before will say, "The messengers of our Lord had come with the truth, so are there [now] any intercessors to intercede for us or could we be sent back to do other than what we used to do?" They will have lost themselves, and lost from them is what they used to invent.

targetTranslation: your (all of you) master who completely nurtures and cares for (subject of إِنَّ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكُمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ ٱسْتَوَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ يُغْشِى ٱلَّيْلَ ٱلنَّهَارَ يَطْلُبُهُۥ حَثِيثًا وَٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ وَٱلنُّجُومَ مُسَخَّرٰتٍۭ بِأَمْرِهِۦٓ أَلَا لَهُ ٱلْخَلْقُ وَٱلْأَمْرُ تَبَارَكَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, your Lord is Allāh, who created the heavens and earth in six days and then established Himself above the Throne. He covers the night with the day, [another night] chasing it rapidly; and [He created] the sun, the moon, and the stars, subjected by His command. Unquestionably, His is the creation and the command; blessed is Allāh, Lord of the worlds.

targetTranslation: He is supremely blessed (referring to Allah)
ayahArabic: إِنَّ رَبَّكُمُ ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ فِى سِتَّةِ أَيَّامٍ ثُمَّ ٱسْتَوَىٰ عَلَى ٱلْعَرْشِ يُغْشِى ٱلَّيْلَ ٱلنَّهَارَ يَطْلُبُهُۥ حَثِيثًا وَٱلشَّمْسَ وَٱلْقَمَرَ وَٱلنُّجُومَ مُسَخَّرٰتٍۭ بِأَمْرِهِۦٓ أَلَا لَهُ ٱلْخَلْقُ وَٱلْأَمْرُ تَبَارَكَ ٱللَّهُ رَبُّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, your Lord is Allāh, who created the heavens and earth in six days and then established Himself above the Throne. He covers the night with the day, [another night] chasing it rapidly; and [He created] the sun, the moon, and the stars, subjected by His command. Unquestionably, His is the creation and the command; blessed is Allāh, Lord of the worlds.

ayahEnglish: Indeed, your Lord is Allāh, who created the heavens and earth in six days and then established Himself above the Throne. targetTranslation: call out! (command to all of you) (to رَبَّكُمْ)
ayahArabic: ٱدْعُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ تَضَرُّعًا وَخُفْيَةً إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُعْتَدِينَ
ayahEnglish: Call upon your Lord in humility and privately; indeed, He does not like transgressors.

ayahArabic: ٱدْعُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ تَضَرُّعًا وَخُفْيَةً إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُعْتَدِينَ
ayahEnglish: Call upon your Lord in humility and privately; indeed, He does not like transgressors.

targetTranslation: in intense humility (describing how to call upon رَبَّكُمْ)
ayahArabic: ٱدْعُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ تَضَرُّعًا وَخُفْيَةً إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُعْتَدِينَ
ayahEnglish: Call upon your Lord in humility and privately; indeed, He does not like transgressors.

ayahArabic: ٱدْعُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ تَضَرُّعًا وَخُفْيَةً إِنَّهُۥ لَا يُحِبُّ ٱلْمُعْتَدِينَ
ayahEnglish: Call upon your Lord in humility and privately; indeed, He does not like transgressors.

ayahArabic: وَلَا تُفْسِدُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ بَعْدَ إِصْلٰحِهَا وَٱدْعُوهُ خَوْفًا وَطَمَعًا إِنَّ رَحْمَتَ ٱللَّهِ قَرِيبٌ مِّنَ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And cause not corruption upon the earth after its reformation. And invoke Him in fear and aspiration. Indeed, the mercy of Allāh is near to the doers of good.

ayahArabic: وَلَا تُفْسِدُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ بَعْدَ إِصْلٰحِهَا وَٱدْعُوهُ خَوْفًا وَطَمَعًا إِنَّ رَحْمَتَ ٱللَّهِ قَرِيبٌ مِّنَ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And cause not corruption upon the earth after its reformation. And invoke Him in fear and aspiration. Indeed, the mercy of Allāh is near to the doers of good.

targetTranslation: its fixing/improvement (referring to الْأَرْضِ - the earth)
ayahArabic: وَلَا تُفْسِدُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ بَعْدَ إِصْلٰحِهَا وَٱدْعُوهُ خَوْفًا وَطَمَعًا إِنَّ رَحْمَتَ ٱللَّهِ قَرِيبٌ مِّنَ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ

targetTranslation: in fear (object of ادْعُوهُ - call upon Him)

targetTranslation: near (as a quality of Allah's mercy)
ayahArabic: وَلَا تُفْسِدُوا۟ فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ بَعْدَ إِصْلٰحِهَا وَٱدْعُوهُ خَوْفًا وَطَمَعًا إِنَّ رَحْمَتَ ٱللَّهِ قَرِيبٌ مِّنَ ٱلْمُحْسِنِينَ
ayahEnglish: And cause not corruption upon the earth after its reformation. And invoke Him in fear and aspiration. Indeed, the mercy of Allāh is near to the doers of good.

ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُرْسِلُ ٱلرِّيٰحَ بُشْرًۢا بَيْنَ يَدَىْ رَحْمَتِهِۦ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَقَلَّتْ سَحَابًا ثِقَالًا سُقْنٰهُ لِبَلَدٍ مَّيِّتٍ فَأَنزَلْنَا بِهِ ٱلْمَآءَ فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِۦ مِن كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ كَذٰلِكَ نُخْرِجُ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is He who sends the winds as good tidings before His mercy [i.e., rainfall] until, when they have carried heavy rainclouds, We drive them to a dead land and We send down rain therein and bring forth thereby [some] of all the fruits. Thus will We bring forth the dead; perhaps you may be reminded.

ayahArabic: وَهُوَ ٱلَّذِى يُرْسِلُ ٱلرِّيٰحَ بُشْرًۢا بَيْنَ يَدَىْ رَحْمَتِهِۦ حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَآ أَقَلَّتْ سَحَابًا ثِقَالًا سُقْنٰهُ لِبَلَدٍ مَّيِّتٍ فَأَنزَلْنَا بِهِ ٱلْمَآءَ فَأَخْرَجْنَا بِهِۦ مِن كُلِّ ٱلثَّمَرٰتِ كَذٰلِكَ نُخْرِجُ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَذَكَّرُونَ

Thus will We bring forth the dead; perhaps you may be reminded.

ayahEnglish: And it is He who sends the winds as good tidings before His mercy [i.e., rainfall] until, when they have carried heavy rainclouds, We drive them to a dead land and We send down rain therein and bring forth thereby [some] of all the fruits. Thus will We bring forth the dead; perhaps you may be reminded.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْبَلَدُ ٱلطَّيِّبُ يَخْرُجُ نَبَاتُهُۥ بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِۦ وَٱلَّذِى خَبُثَ لَا يَخْرُجُ إِلَّا نَكِدًا كَذٰلِكَ نُصَرِّفُ ٱلْءَايٰتِ لِقَوْمٍ يَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the good land - its vegetation emerges by permission of its Lord; but that which is bad - nothing emerges except sparsely, with difficulty. Thus do We diversify the signs for a people who are grateful.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْبَلَدُ ٱلطَّيِّبُ يَخْرُجُ نَبَاتُهُۥ بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِۦ وَٱلَّذِى خَبُثَ لَا يَخْرُجُ إِلَّا نَكِدًا كَذٰلِكَ نُصَرِّفُ ٱلْءَايٰتِ لِقَوْمٍ يَشْكُرُونَ

ayahArabic: لَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ فَقَالَ يٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: We had certainly sent Noah to his people, and he said, "O my people, worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him. Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a tremendous Day."

targetTranslation: Noah (as the object of أَرْسَلْنَا - we sent)
ayahArabic: لَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ فَقَالَ يٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ

targetTranslation: great/mighty (describing عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ - punishment of a day)
ayahArabic: لَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوْمِهِۦ فَقَالَ يٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ إِنِّىٓ أَخَافُ عَلَيْكُمْ عَذَابَ يَوْمٍ عَظِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: We had certainly sent Noah to his people, and he said, "O my people, worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him. Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a tremendous Day."

ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِن قَوْمِهِۦٓ إِنَّا لَنَرَىٰكَ فِى ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Said the eminent among his people, "Indeed, we see you in clear error."

ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِن قَوْمِهِۦٓ إِنَّا لَنَرَىٰكَ فِى ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Said the eminent among his people, "Indeed, we see you in clear error."

ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِن قَوْمِهِۦٓ إِنَّا لَنَرَىٰكَ فِى ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Said the eminent among his people, "Indeed, we see you in clear error."

targetTranslation: one who/that makes very clear (in genitive case)
ayahArabic: قَالَ ٱلْمَلَأُ مِن قَوْمِهِۦٓ إِنَّا لَنَرَىٰكَ فِى ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Said the eminent among his people, "Indeed, we see you in clear error."

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ لَيْسَ بِى ضَلٰلَةٌ وَلٰكِنِّى رَسُولٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Noah] said, "O my people, there is not error in me, but I am a messenger from the Lord of the worlds.

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ لَيْسَ بِى ضَلٰلَةٌ وَلٰكِنِّى رَسُولٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ

ayahArabic: قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ لَيْسَ بِى ضَلٰلَةٌ وَلٰكِنِّى رَسُولٌ مِّن رَّبِّ ٱلْعٰلَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: [Noah] said, "O my people, there is not error in me, but I am a messenger from the Lord of the worlds.

targetTranslation: I deliver/convey to you all (رِسٰلٰتِ رَبِّى)
ayahArabic: أُبَلِّغُكُمْ رِسٰلٰتِ رَبِّى وَأَنصَحُ لَكُمْ وَأَعْلَمُ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: I convey to you the messages of my Lord and advise you; and I know from Allāh what you do not know.

ayahArabic: أُبَلِّغُكُمْ رِسٰلٰتِ رَبِّى وَأَنصَحُ لَكُمْ وَأَعْلَمُ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: I convey to you the messages of my Lord and advise you; and I know from Allāh what you do not know.

targetTranslation: my Lord (the one speaking in أُبَلِّغُكُمْ - I convey to you)

ayahArabic: أُبَلِّغُكُمْ رِسٰلٰتِ رَبِّى وَأَنصَحُ لَكُمْ وَأَعْلَمُ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: I convey to you the messages of my Lord and advise you; and I know from Allāh what you do not know.

ayahArabic: أُبَلِّغُكُمْ رِسٰلٰتِ رَبِّى وَأَنصَحُ لَكُمْ وَأَعْلَمُ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: I convey to you the messages of my Lord and advise you; and I know from Allāh what you do not know.

targetTranslation: you (all) know (referring to the people being addressed in this ayah)
ayahArabic: أُبَلِّغُكُمْ رِسٰلٰتِ رَبِّى وَأَنصَحُ لَكُمْ وَأَعْلَمُ مِنَ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَا تَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: I convey to you the messages of my Lord and advise you; and I know from Allāh what you do not know.

targetTranslation: are you (all) amazed? (connected to أَن جَآءَكُمْ)
ayahArabic: أَوَعَجِبْتُمْ أَن جَآءَكُمْ ذِكْرٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ عَلَىٰ رَجُلٍ مِّنكُمْ لِيُنذِرَكُمْ وَلِتَتَّقُوا۟ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then do you wonder that there has come to you a reminder from your Lord through a man from among you, that he may warn you and that you may fear Allāh so you might receive mercy?"

ayahArabic: أَوَعَجِبْتُمْ أَن جَآءَكُمْ ذِكْرٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ عَلَىٰ رَجُلٍ مِّنكُمْ لِيُنذِرَكُمْ وَلِتَتَّقُوا۟ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then do you wonder that there has come to you a reminder from your Lord through a man from among you, that he may warn you and that you may fear Allāh so you might receive mercy?"

ayahArabic: أَوَعَجِبْتُمْ أَن جَآءَكُمْ ذِكْرٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ عَلَىٰ رَجُلٍ مِّنكُمْ لِيُنذِرَكُمْ وَلِتَتَّقُوا۟ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then do you wonder that there has come to you a reminder from your Lord through a man from among you, that he may warn you and that you may fear Allāh so you might receive mercy?"

targetTranslation: your Lord (referring to all those being addressed)
ayahArabic: أَوَعَجِبْتُمْ أَن جَآءَكُمْ ذِكْرٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ عَلَىٰ رَجُلٍ مِّنكُمْ لِيُنذِرَكُمْ وَلِتَتَّقُوا۟ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then do you wonder that there has come to you a reminder from your Lord through a man from among you, that he may warn you and that you may fear Allāh so you might receive mercy?"

ayahArabic: أَوَعَجِبْتُمْ أَن جَآءَكُمْ ذِكْرٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ عَلَىٰ رَجُلٍ مِّنكُمْ لِيُنذِرَكُمْ وَلِتَتَّقُوا۟ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then do you wonder that there has come to you a reminder from your Lord through a man from among you, that he may warn you and that you may fear Allāh so you might receive mercy?"

ayahArabic: أَوَعَجِبْتُمْ أَن جَآءَكُمْ ذِكْرٌ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ عَلَىٰ رَجُلٍ مِّنكُمْ لِيُنذِرَكُمْ وَلِتَتَّقُوا۟ وَلَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Then do you wonder that there has come to you a reminder from your Lord through a man from among you, that he may warn you and that you may fear Allāh so you might receive mercy?"

targetTranslation: with him (referring to نَجَيْنٰهُ - the one who was saved)
ayahArabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَنجَيْنٰهُ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ وَأَغْرَقْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا عَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: But they denied him, so We saved him and those who were with him in the ship. And We drowned those who denied Our signs. Indeed, they were a blind people.

targetTranslation: those who (refers to the group who were with him)
ayahArabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَنجَيْنٰهُ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ وَأَغْرَقْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا عَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: But they denied him, so We saved him and those who were with him in the ship. And We drowned those who denied Our signs. Indeed, they were a blind people.

ayahArabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَنجَيْنٰهُ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ وَأَغْرَقْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا عَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: But they denied him, so We saved him and those who were with him in the ship. And We drowned those who denied Our signs. Indeed, they were a blind people.

targetTranslation: they were (referring to those who denied Our signs)
ayahArabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَنجَيْنٰهُ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ وَأَغْرَقْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا عَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: But they denied him, so We saved him and those who were with him in the ship. And We drowned those who denied Our signs. Indeed, they were a blind people.

targetTranslation: a people, a nation (acted on by كَانُوا)
ayahArabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَنجَيْنٰهُ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ وَأَغْرَقْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا عَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: But they denied him, so We saved him and those who were with him in the ship. And We drowned those who denied Our signs. Indeed, they were a blind people.

ayahArabic: فَكَذَّبُوهُ فَأَنجَيْنٰهُ وَٱلَّذِينَ مَعَهُۥ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ وَأَغْرَقْنَا ٱلَّذِينَ كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايٰتِنَآ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ قَوْمًا عَمِينَ
ayahEnglish: But they denied him, so We saved him and those who were with him in the ship. And We drowned those who denied Our signs. Indeed, they were a blind people.

targetTranslation: Aad (as the object being addressed in this ayah)
ayahArabic: وَإِلَىٰ عَادٍ أَخَاهُمْ هُودًا قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to the ʿAad [We sent] their brother Hūd. He said, "O my people, worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him. Then will you not fear Him?"

ayahArabic: وَإِلَىٰ عَادٍ أَخَاهُمْ هُودًا قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to the ʿAad [We sent] their brother Hūd. He said, "O my people, worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him. Then will you not fear Him?"

targetTranslation: Hud (as their brother who was sent to them)
ayahArabic: وَإِلَىٰ عَادٍ أَخَاهُمْ هُودًا قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to the ʿAad [We sent] their brother Hūd. He said, "O my people, worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him. Then will you not fear Him?"

ayahArabic: وَإِلَىٰ عَادٍ أَخَاهُمْ هُودًا قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
ayahEnglish: And to the ʿAad [We sent] their brother Hūd. He said, "O my people, worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him. Then will you not fear Him?"

ayahArabic: وَإِلَىٰ عَادٍ أَخَاهُمْ هُودًا قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ

targetTranslation: Allah (as the object of اعْبُدُوا - worship)
ayahArabic: وَإِلَىٰ عَادٍ أَخَاهُمْ هُودًا قَالَ يٰقَوْمِ ٱعْبُدُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ مَا لَكُم مِّنْ إِلٰهٍ غَيْرُهُۥٓ أَفَلَا تَتَّقُونَ
